query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(entry_date, '%Y-%m') as month,
  SUM(pnl) / 100.0 as total_pnl_dollars,
  COUNT(*) as trade_count
FROM trades 
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(entry_date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 50;
